name: Tatsumi Oga
description: **Height:** 179 cm (5'11'') **Occupation:** High school student, adolescent delinquent **Debut:** Ep. 1/Ch. 1 Tatsumi Oga is the main protagonist in the Beelzebub series, first introduced as a strong fighter, beating up some fellow class mates and then making them bow down to him because they had attacked him in his sleep. He was picked to become Beelzebub's parent as he possessed the qualities of the ideal parent for the future Demon Lord: strong, arrogant, and thinks-nothing-of-fellow-man. In

name: Inori Yuitsuka
description: A 5th grade elementary student who loves figure skating so much she used to practice it in secret. Though she greatly lacks academic skill, when she's in the rink she's like a different person.

name: Noko Shikanoko
description: __Grade:__ 3rd Year __Positions:__ Founder, Mascot, and Official Deer of the Deer Club, Part-Time Deer at Hino Zoo. Noko Shikanoko is a unique human-deer hybrid and the founder and mascot of the Deer Club at Hino Minami High School. She is a transfer student who becomes the best friend, classmate, and clubmate of [Torako Koshi](https://anilist.co/character/330137/Torako-Koshi).

name: Rei Ryuugazaki
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'10") __Swimming style__: Butterfly stroke A freshman who joins the Iwatobi High School swim team. Rei Ryuugazaki is a classmate of Nagisa's in 10th grade. He was originally a member of the track team, but decided to join the swimming club instead. A handsome, intelligent young man who often gets manipulated by Rin for some reason. (Source: ANN)

name: Tooru Rikiishi
description: __Gym:__ Shiraki __Weight Class:__ Welterweight __Style(s):__ Hybrid, Brawling Style __Stance(s):__ Orthodox Stance, Brawling Stance __Trainer:__ Shiraki Youko (minimal) Rikiishi and Joe first meet in the juvenile detention center, where Rikiishi was introduced as a boxer who was sentenced to the juvenile detention center because he had punched an member of the audience half to death after they had claimed that the match was rigged in Rikiishi's favor, enraging him. ~!On their first encounter Jo

name: Hiroomi Nase
description: **Race:** Spirit World Warrior __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10") Nase Hiroomi is the eldest son of the famous underworlder Nase family and Mitsuki's elder brother. It appears that Hirooumi and Akihito had something happen between them in the past, but now they are on such good terms that they can joke around with each other. He has a little sister complex. Due to his barrier powers as an underworlder, he is extremely sensitive to cold, and is almost always seen wearing a muffler or scarf. Hiroomi is a

name: Mamoru Endou
description: Endou Mamoru is the captain of Raimon jr. High's Soccer team. He starts out as a goalie but also plays as libero later on. He is the type of person who never gives up and his teammates benefit from his mental strength and encouragement. Mamoru always thinks of others before himself. He also shows great admiration toward his grandfather Daisuke, which was also one of the greatest goalkeepers around when he was alive.

name: Shirou Fujimoto
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'8") Shirou Fujimoto was Rin and Yukio's guardian and was also considered to be one of the most powerful Exorcists in the world. He was thought to be the only man in the world that was able to sustain possession by Satan himself and thus Satan was constantly after his body. Fujimoto had a familiar sith cat demon, which he called Kuro, that Rin had inherited. He was a confirmed Aria, Dragoon and tamer and could possibly have been a Knight and a Docter as two of those who have

name: Tae Yamada
description: A mysterious girl with an unknown past, titled only as the Legendary Tae Yamada. She is the only one of the girls who has not fully regained consciousness, and so has remained a mindless zombie. As such, Tae is unpredictable and driven by pure instinct, doing things such as biting at the other members and launching herself at the crowd. However, she does seem to have some semblance of awareness, being able to at least understand the members to some degree and be cooperative enough to participate

name: Mochizou Ooji
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'9") Mochizou is Tamako's childhood friend whose family runs Ouji-ya, a mochi shop located across from Tama-ya. Though their fathers are not on good terms due to business competition, he and Tamako are good friends. He is in love with Tamako.

name: Raiden Shuga
description: __Height:__ 185 cm Raiden Shuga is the vice captain of Spearhead Squadron. As a First Lieutenant, he holds the position of operations commander of the Eighty-Sixth Strike Package and its 1st Armored Division should Shin be deemed unfit to command. His Personal Name is Wehrwolf. Having survived four years on the Eastern Front and the Special Reconnaissance Mission, he is considered one of the most elite Processors alive. As he spent three years with Shin prior to joining Spearhead Squadron, Raide

name: Kiyomasa Senji
description: Senji was the first "Deadman" that Ganta encountered at the prison. After making their way to sector G, Crow destroyed the Necro Macro security robot which had been chasing Ganta, Shiro and Yoh. After a small skirmish, and an interruption by Shiro, Crow was subdued by the Deadman security. The next day, Ganta and Senji were slated to be the next two Deadmen to compete in the "Carnival Corpse." Despite Senji's experience and skill with his 'branch' ability, Ganta managed to win by fooling Senji.
mediaTitles: Deadman Wonderland: The Red Knife Wielder
searchTerms: Deadman Wonderland: The Red Knife Wielder

name: Pecorine
description: __Race:__ Human __Height:__ 156 cm Possessing a voracious appetite and boundless energy, Pecorine lives a seemingly carefree life from meal to meal. She is ever optimistic and is proactive in making friends, regardless of their attitude in return. Pecorine also loves to travel in search of exotic delicacies, and pays respect to all life by not letting any food that is prepared go to waste. She is the Guild Master of the guild 'Gourmet Edifice'.

name: Zapp Renfro
description: Described as a hotheaded, hyper-sexual juvenile punk, he is easily annoyed, quick to lose his temper, and his juvenile actions often get him and others into trouble. Despite this, he is supposedly good at looking after new members, and so was assigned as Leo's partner/bodyguard. He is also something of a ladies man, possessing several lovers in town. For reasons unknown, he continuously tries to fight Klaus, only to be routinely smacked down.
mediaTitles: Blood Blockade Battlefront: King of Kings Restaurant Fit for a King
searchTerms: Blood Blockade Battlefront: King of Kings Restaurant Fit for a King

name: Rion Enomoto
description: Yu Natsume’s childhood friend and first crush; also grew up alongside Shinji Makishima and Himari Inuzuka. Her older sister Kureha, a fashion model, first introduced Rion (and indirectly Himari) to Yu’s flower accessories back in middle school, leading Rion to reunite with him over a broken bracelet he’d made.
mediaTitles: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)

name: Maki Shijo
description: Maki is a classmate and friend of [Nagisa](https://anilist.co/character/134330). She has short hair styled in short pigtails. She is friends with Nagisa and is secretly jealous of Nagisa's relationship with her boyfriend, as she too liked Kashiwagi's Boyfriend, but could not confess before. As a branch member of the Shinomiya clan, she is [Kaguya](https://anilist.co/character/120649)'s second cousin twice removed so she sometimes refers to Kaguya as "Auntie". name: Miyu Suzuki
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") An energetic but self-conscious girl. She admires [Tani](https://anilist.co/character/281251/Yusuke-Tani) for being the complete opposite of herself, but she can't interact with him normally and always ends up bothering him with pointless conversation.

name: Natsuki Nakagawa
description: __Height__: 156 cm __Instrument__: Euphonium Natsuki is a reserved girl who is seen rarely talking, and she has an aloof and calm attitude. It is later revealed that the second-years are like this because of an event which occurred the year before Kumiko Oumae's first year at Kitauji. However, Natsuki is normally friendly to everyone, and tends to be mature and calm in most situations. She is also understanding of situations and takes everything quite nicely.

name: Chika Komari
description: A first-year student at Tsuwabuki High and a member of the Literature Club, she is an avid web/light novel reader and writer. Behind her timid and awkward exterior lies a hardworking girl who deeply cares for her siblings and treasures her closest relationships.

name: Ikalgo
description: __Nen Type:__ Manipulation Ikalgo is a former officer of the chimera ants whom eventually befriends Killua. Ikalgo, an octopus, wishes he had been a squid instead. After saving Killua's life after a battle, Ikalgo teams up with him in the assault on the palace of East Gorteau. ## __Ikalgo's Abilities:__ ~! __Fleadom__ (蚤弾フリーダム Bullets of Flea) _Type: Conjuration_ Fleadom allows Ikalgo to turn two of his tentacles into an air rifle. name: Brunhilde
description: __Species__: Demigod Brunhilde is the eldest of the 13 Valkyrie Sisters and the main protagonist of the series. She is the one who chose humanity's finest and strongest warriors in Ragnarok to stand up against the strongest gods in combat and slay them in an attempt to save Humanity.

name: Shun Uruma
description: Shun often got bullied in his childhood. ~!His demeanor and life changed after his bullies killed his parents and beat his brother into a coma. After receiving training from his grandfather, he decides to take revenge on his bullies.!~

name: Medea Belial
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5' 6") As a reputable, high-ranking noble, Medea possesses a certain level of haughtiness. Though she exhibits proper grace and savoir-faire in public as the duke's daughter, she is also known to have an unpleasant temper. Medea often treats those of lower class, typically ordinary civilians and servants, with contempt and condescension.
